'''Pethros Vos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kiffu Guardians|Kiffu Guardian]]. He was married to [[Quian Vos]] with whom he had a son, [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan]]. Pethros and Quian were given as a sacrifice to the [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] by [[Tinté Vos]], in exchange for the Anzati feeding on the [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] prisoners.

Pethros was remembered by his son, Quinlan, throughout his life. Quinlan's son, [[Korto Vos]], carried on the Vos family.

==Appearances==
